commands.repair_reason: - [P1] The remaining blockers are contributor real behavior proof, a focused test repair, and maintainer acceptance of the security-boundary policy; automation cannot supply the contributorÔÇÖs real-environment proof.; Needs attention: The diff intentionally lets a runtime wildcard bypass static profile/provider-profile tool filters, so the security-boundary policy needs maintainer acceptance before merge.; Review fin... (sha=689a96812a9f569c640ac18acf460dd1994b275e)
commands.review_summary:
The PR makes `createOpenClawCodingTools` skip static profile and provider-profile filters when `runtimeToolAllowlist` contains `*`, and adds regression tests for exec visibility/background behavior under the `messaging` profile.

PR surface: Source +12, Tests +48. Total +60 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: the cron executor passes payload `toolsAllow` to `runEmbeddedAgent`, the embedded runner passes it into `createOpenClawCodingTools`, and current main still applies the `messaging` profile before the final wildcard filter. I did not run a live cron repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blockers are contributor real behavior proof, a focused test repair, and maintainer acceptance of the security-boundary policy; automation cannot supply the contributorÔÇÖs real-environment proof.

target.title: fix(agents): allow runtime wildcard tool allowlist to override staticÔÇŽ
target.body:
## Summary

When a cron job sets `toolsAllow: ["*"]`, the runtime wildcard should override the agent's static tool profile (e.g. `messaging`) so that `exec` and other coding tools remain available ÔÇö including background/yield behavior.

Previously, `createOpenClawCodingTools` applied the static profile policy via `applyToolPolicyPipeline` before considering the runtime allowlist. This caused `exec` to be filtered out for cron sessions using the `messaging` profile even when `toolsAllow: ["*"]` was explicitly set. Additionally, `allowBackground` was computed from the original profile before the wildcard override, causing exec to become visible while `background: true` still ran synchronously.

### Key Changes

- `src/agents/agent-tools.ts`: When `runtimeToolAllowlist` contains `*`, skip `profilePolicy` and `providerProfilePolicy` steps in both `allowBackground` derivation and the final tool policy pipeline.
- `src/agents/agent-tools.runtime-allowlist-override.test.ts`: Add regression tests verifying wildcard override behavior for both exec visibility and allowBackground consistency.

### Issue Reference

Fixes #89228 (Bug B: exec unavailable in isolated sessions)

## Real Behavior Proof

**Behavior addressed**: `exec` tool is now available with correct background behavior when cron isolated sessions use `toolsAllow: ["*"]` with a `messaging` profile agent. The wildcard override now applies before `allowBackground` derivation so exec background/yield behavior stays consistent with exec visibility.

**Real environment tested**: Linux (Ubuntu), Node.js 22.22, real OpenClaw checkout at `07 Open Source/02-projects/openclaw`, branch `fix/cron-exec-wildcard-override-89228`, commit `689a96812`.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch**:
```bash
# 1. Checkout the fix branch
cd openclaw
git checkout fix/cron-exec-wildcard-override-89228

# 2. Run regression test suite against createOpenClawCodingTools
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/agent-tools.runtime-allowlist-override.test.ts --run --reporter=verbose

# 3. Run existing tool policy tests to confirm no regressions
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-tool-construction-plan.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/effective-tool-policy.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.workspace-only-false.test.ts --run
```

**Evidence after fix**:
```
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/agent-tools.runtime-allowlist-override.test.ts --run --reporter=verbose

 RUN  v4.1.7

 Ôťô |unit-fast| src/agents/agent-tools.runtime-allowlist-override.test.ts > includes exec when runtimeToolAllowlist contains wildcard even with messaging profile 906ms
 Ôťô |unit-fast| src/agents/agent-tools.runtime-allowlist-override.test.ts > excludes exec with messaging profile and no runtime wildcard 84ms
 Ôťô |unit-fast| src/agents/agent-tools.runtime-allowlist-override.test.ts > allows exec background when runtimeToolAllowlist contains wildcard with messaging profile 18ms
 Ôťô |unit-fast| src/agents/agent-tools.runtime-allowlist-override.test.ts > does not allow exec background with messaging profile and no runtime wildcard 11ms

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  4 passed (4)
   Duration  12.80s

$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt-tool-construction-plan.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/effective-tool-policy.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.workspace-only-false.test.ts --run

 Ôťô |unit-fast| attempt-tool-construction-plan.test.ts (21 tests) 21ms
 Ôťô |agents| effective-tool-policy.test.ts (12 tests) 65ms
 Ôťô |agents| agent-tools.workspace-only-false.test.ts (13 tests) 159ms
 Test Files  3 passed (3)
      Tests  46 passed (46)
```

**Observed result after fix**: 
- `toolsAllow: ["*"]` + `messaging` profile Ôćĺ `exec` is present in tool list Ôťô
- `toolsAllow: ["*"]` + `messaging` profile Ôćĺ `allowBackground` is not false (consistent with exec visibility) Ôťô
- `messaging` profile without wildcard Ôćĺ `exec` correctly absent (narrow profile preserved) Ôťô
- Existing tool policy tests unaffected (46 tests pass) Ôťô

**What was not tested**: Live cron scheduler execution with running gateway. Local pnpm environment issue prevented full `pnpm dev` gateway startup for end-to-end cron proof. The `createOpenClawCodingTools` function is the exact entry point used by the cron isolated session path (`src/cron/isolated-agent/run-executor.ts:312` Ôćĺ `runEmbeddedAgent` Ôćĺ `createOpenClawCodingTools`), so the vitest proof covers the real tool-construction code path.
target.author: tanshanshan

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
